---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible problem in the application or tooling
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: [bug]
assignees: []
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps To Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Run '...'
4. Observe error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Reproducibility

- [ ] Always
- [ ] Intermittent
- [ ] Unable to reproduce consistently

## Environment

- OS:
- Browser (if applicable):
- Node version:
- Branch/commit:

## Logs / Screenshots

Add relevant logs, stack traces, or screenshots.

## Additional Context

Anything else that could help triage.
